evals.prompt: Here is a PDF of my brand contract.
expect: if yield < PDF_MIN_YIELD: ingestion_status is metadata_only, needs_more_info returned
no guessed content from a low-yield PDF

evals.prompt: Parse this file I received from a brand partner [external file].
Create a downloadable materials list from my uploaded notes.
expect: file_type_confirmed: true in the output before any downloadable is produced
correct format for the output artifact is confirmed with the user
